title: Pencil Design System by Brainly – UI Tools & Components
content: Pencil from Directories: Components: Pencil Design System crafted to enhance user experiences on Brainly's platform. System offers a diverse array of design principles, guidelines, and reusable components. Design System provides a centralized hub for design assets and documentation, fostering collaboration and consistency across projects. Pencil serves as the foundation of Brainly's mission to empower learners worldwide, fostering a community-driven approach to education and knowledge sharing. Color System Component overview Elevation Figma Icons Illustrations Layout Motion Spacing Storybook Styles Theming Typography Voice and Tone Badges Button Cards Chip Dialog Popover Progress bar Select Snackbar Tooltip
